raw_text: blinkit is worst app in terms of amount refund. i ordered something, money debited but order was not placed. So I was supposed to get refund but blinkit is constantly delaying my refund such an awful experience!!! very disappointed I have sent you mails multiple times asking about my refund but still I haven't received my refund.

While deliveries are prompt, support is pathetic. Chat support is totally automated and becomes frustrating when it can't solve your issue. No option for a human support executive. Email them and the response is even more pathetic. They take forever even for simple issues. Never experienced such bad support from any other grocery delivery app.

GUYSS DID YK if you type random letters like a toddler or baby typing it shows chocolates and snacks!! (type longerrr to see results). lovely marketing and only found in blinkit ... whether it's midnight cravings or the morning i need something for a project or anything blinkit is there for rescue , 24/7 available sometimes, and the things available are increasing day by day , my favourite app EVERRRR

Firstly the app was performing goo but nowadays I observe some problems like no facility to contact directly delivery boy for any update, Cant update address if you make wrong address in order, Tried to cancel the order in between for betterment of delivery boy but can't and then Extra charges in future order have to be suffered blockage in Cash on delivery after cancel of order

Supplied rotten ridge gaurd which will not be available in the street vendors. How this so-called corporates gets such items. I want to upload photos of the item supplied but unable. I have loaded the photos in the app but NO action. Login was done through Zomato, credibility of Zomato???

i ordered something and it came to the current location instead of the address i mentioned. So now I can't repeat the same order on cash on delivery. Therefore, I'm deleting this app and going to instamart. I'm so sorry blinkit this was my first and last order.

My name shubham Bhalerao my order is dermatach sunscreen 190 rupee but unfortunately order cancel order date 25-05-2026 order cancel but refund no my bank account  and Your app is very poor. There is no proper customer support available for customers. The support section only has chat options, and they are not helpful either. The app does not show the correct options. Also, your customer care number is not available on Google. This makes it very difficult for customers to get assistance."

some of the blinkit outlets simply pack what they have irrespective of what the customers have ordered. if you have given a tip to the delivery agents, it gets wasted because now another guy will come and pick it up and initiate the refund.. This is just fraud and scam. are the ones who pack the orders little children who don't know how to read? not even the labels (brand names) match. no need to help me I have uninstalled the app, no plans of installing it again.

Very useful app but it's still not serviceable in some locations. Kindly try to make it available to Baleswar city of Odisha as a lot of people require blinkit serviced in that area as it a highly populated city with high raising demands.

Update: Your support team is blindly asking for an Order ID without even reading my complaint. I explicitly mentioned that this is an issue with your CHECKOUT UI and BILLING SYSTEM. I DID NOT place any order because of your unethical practice of auto-checking the ₹1 "Feeding India donation" and adding unfair charges on a ₹72 cart. Stop using generic copy-paste replies. Fix the pre-selected donation bug in the app setup so that customers don't have to deal with hidden additions!

Great app, very very convenient. The service is amazing, I had a problem with pay on delivery but as soon as I posted it, the issue was fixed just in a few hours. It's definitely something that you should use in day to day life.

they don't not allow return of damage product jamming upload of photo by saying we are facing issue this let them avoide product return nice style of frod i faced this many time ignoring by thinking network issue but every time I am unable to upload damaged product photo from web or app of blinkit. they also do not provide other options. so settle with no claim customer after frustrated stop uploading photo and forget it. they do not review feedback on product. I receive iceam melted and dam

kindly please include remote areas even if it's taking over 30 mins. there are ppl in an emergency of things to buy. unfortunately we don't have the relevant stores nearby or delivery apps choosing to deliver there. I suggest you to launch an app specifically for deliveries which takes over 30min.

This app is very bad. The delivery guy took extra money and didn’t return it. When I file a complaint, no action is taken — they just give an automatic response and ignore the issue. I had a very bad experience. After today, I will never use this app again.

there is no ads and the wonderful thing is that the delivery boys are very sweet to the women or a man I will all the items but some things like ice creams have limited stock so can you please order the stock wise all the things and not so ok but if you are an emergency so you have to go to the market and do offline shopping because it is taking too much time for delivering something but if it delivered at your door step so and there is a so many sale so we have to discount so this is good
the timing is never same as actually how time works. it will show delivering in 6mins for 20mins. and the help team is not very helpful. other than that, products are really good.

I’m facing a payment issue on Blinkit. None of the payment methods like UPI, cards, or wallets are working. Every option shows ‘Currently disabled due to a technical problem’ or ‘This payment method is not available at the moment.’ I tried multiple UPI apps like Google Pay, PhonePe, and Paytm, but the issue still continues. My internet connection is stable, and I already tried restarting the app. Please fix this issue as soon as possible because I’m unable to complete my order.”

The app is very convenient to use and it saves lots of time and efforts... The delivery partners give their best to deliver in 10 minutes without any burden, even in this extreme heat of jalgaon and nashik too... 😁 Thanks a lot Blinkit...

please don't debit online payment.. because I have received wrong product so I can cancel my order with the clarity. but I can't receive my refund today is 6 days completed... I remember to the costumer I have no refund details...The customer is saying, "Talk to your bank. It's shameful that you haven't even issued a refund, I don't have any updates, and I should talk to the bank? I will never tell anyone to shop from here, seriously it is a very bad platform.

Amazing app! you can order while watching a show at home no need to worry about anything. payment options might annoy you as cash on delivery is not available sometimes, however, a great option to keep in emergency situation.👍👏
